title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: Cole Medin analyzes Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model withdrawal following a US government export-control directive allegedly tied to jailbreak concerns. The video evaluates whether Fable 5 lived up to hype relative to Opus 4.8 based on pre-withdrawal benchmarks and discusses implications for developers building on these models.
writeup: Cole Medin examines Anthropic's withdrawal of Claude Fable 5, which the summary ties to a US government export-control directive linked to jailbreak concerns. The video assesses whether Fable 5 met expectations against Opus 4.8 using benchmarks recorded before the withdrawal. It also covers the consequences for developers who built on the model, given that it is no longer available.
